questions.question: What is e-waste and its major contributor to environmental pollution?
questions.hint: It is electronic waste generated from discarded electronic devices. Electronic devices such as computers, mobile phones, televisions, and refrigerators contribute to e-waste.

questions.question: What is the most effective method of e-waste management to minimize its environmental impact?
questions.hint: Proper disposal through recycling centres or e-waste processing facilities is the most effective method of e-waste management. It helps in recovering valuable materials, reducing landfill waste, and minimizing the release of toxic substances into the environment.

questions.question: What is the role of the government in mitigating the environmental impacts of e-waste?
questions.hint: The government plays a crucial role in mitigating the environmental impacts of e-waste by enforcing regulations, implementing waste management policies, and promoting e-waste recycling and responsible consumption.
